positive: A whimsical, maximalist pattern design featuring stylized celestial elements: crescent moons, shooting stars, deep nebulas, and constellations drawn in a mix of ornate Victorian and modern abstract line art. The primary color palette should be deep indigo, ethereal gold foil accents, and touches of luminous sapphire blue. The composition should be a seamless, repeating tile pattern suitable for all-over apparel printing. Style: Highly detailed etching combined with modern geometric abstraction. Lighting: Illuminated by soft, diffused cosmic glow. Focus on clean lines, high contrast, and strong visual symmetry.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, low resolution, duplicate, out of frame, bad anatomy, extra limbs, poorly drawn hands, noise, grain, messy, smudged, poor quality
